description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the debian:testing Docker image. Define a shared before_script that runs apt-get update && apt-get install -qy ruby asciidoctor ruby-bundler ruby-rspec rubocop ruby-simplecov codespell ronn. Add four jobs in the default test stage: codespell runs rake codespell, manpages runs rake man, style runs rake style, and tests runs rake test, each inheriting the shared before_script. No caches, artifacts, services, or deployment targets are configured.
